Batman v Superman: Dawn of Justice (2016)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $330,360,194Details
International Box Office $544,000,000
Worldwide Box Office $874,360,194
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $23,475,050
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $59,057,147
Total $82,532,197
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Fearing the actions of a god-like super hero left unchecked, Gotham City’s own formidable, forceful vigilante takes on Metropolis’s most revered, modern-day savior, while the world wrestles with what sort of hero it really needs. And with Batman and Superman at war with each other, a new threat quickly arises, putting mankind in greater danger than it has ever known before.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$166,007,347 (50.3% of total gross)
Legs:1.99 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:37.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$263,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,242 opening theaters/4,256 max. theaters, 5.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $456,775,483

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 25th, 2016 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
March 25th, 2016 (IMAX) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: March 23rd, 2016 (Wide) (Norway)
March 23rd, 2016 (Wide) (Spain)
March 23rd, 2016 (Wide) (Italy)
March 23rd, 2016 (Wide) (Indonesia)
March 23rd, 2016 (Wide) (Mexico)
Video Release: June 28th, 2016 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of violence and action throughout, and some sensuality.
(Rating bulletin 2393, 9/30/2015)
Running Time: 151 minutes
Franchise: Man of Steel, Superman, Batman, DC Extended Universe, Wonder Woman
Cast, crew, or production detail: Franchise Crossover, Motion Capture Performance
Character Appearance: Batman, Superman, Wonder Woman
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Dream Sequence, Non-Chronological, Prophetic Dreams, Vigilante
Source material: D.C. Comics
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Warner Bros., RatPac Entertainment, Dune Entertainment, Atlas Entertainment, Cruel and Unusual Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Fearing the actions of a god-like super hero left unchecked, Gotham City’s own formidable, forceful vigilante takes on Metropolis’s most revered, modern-day savior, while the world wrestles with what sort of hero it really needs. And with Batman and Superman at war with each other, a new threat quickly arises, putting mankind in greater danger than it has ever known before.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$166,007,347 (50.3% of total gross)
